text.title: Incident Comms Templates Internal External — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org run a paid service AND have >=1 P1/P2 per quarter AND a named incident commander?

branch.when: paid_service == true AND p1_p2_per_quarter >= 1 AND commander_named == true
branch.conclusion: Ship all four templates (status / customer / exec / internal) with severity + audience matrix.
Block. Establish on-call commander rotation first; anonymous templates rot.
Skip. Defer until customers + recurring incidents exist.
